overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The car travels through a covered commercial arcade with red structural beams before emerging into an open urban plaza with large digital billboards, executing a left turn around parked vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial street with neon-lit market stalls

events.description: futuristic silver sedan overtakes the ego vehicle on the right side

agents.ego_description: driving forward through a covered commercial arcade with red structural beams and vibrant neon signage

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan overtaking on the right and moving ahead

entered.detail: red structural beams and roofing covering the commercial street with multiple levels
illuminated hotel sign visible through the covered structure
building facade with two large circular windows at the end of the arcade
food vendor stall with purple neon lighting and signage

segments.scene_description: Driving through a covered commercial arcade with red structural beams overhead. The street is lined with neon-lit stalls including a ramen shop on the left. A futuristic sedan overtakes on the right as the vehicle approaches a building with distinctive circular windows at the end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with large digital billboards and parked vehicles

events.description: exits covered arcade through a dark underpass into an open urban area with visible sky and large billboards
begins a wide left turn to navigate around parked vehicles in the plaza

agents.ego_description: navigating through an open urban plaza, executing a gradual left turn while passing large digital billboards and maneuvering around parked cars

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'ARASAKA' with corporate imagery and white text
illuminated skyscraper with glass facade rising above the surrounding buildings
massive digital screen showing purple and orange advertisement with character imagery
vintage-style blue pickup truck parked on the right side of the street
dark colored sports car with white racing stripes parked curbside
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky along the right side

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered arcade through a brief dark tunnel into an open urban plaza. The scene features massive digital billboards including an Arasaka corporate advertisement and a large purple screen. The vehicle executes a left turn around a parked blue truck and sports car, with palm trees visible against the night sky and a tall glass tower dominating the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from a claustrophobic, neon-lit commercial corridor into a vast, open urban plaza. It begins by gliding through a covered arcade beneath red structural beams, passing glowing ramen stalls and a futuristic sedan that overtakes on the right. As the vehicle approaches a building with circular windows, the scene briefly narrows into a dark tunnel before bursting open into a wide city square. The environment then expands to reveal massive digital billboards and a towering glass skyscraper, while the camera executes a left turn around a parked blue truck and sports car. Finally, the view opens fully to show palm trees silhouetted against the night sky under the glow of a large purple screen.
